why: Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:hello must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. The official body is name plus profileId; this is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not authentication success, encryption/key exchange, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 0, official hello body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 version table has no Login serverbound mapping.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then the jar-backed oracle runner passes for this case and the full oracle_contracts Rust test surface passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
